series.name: Formula 1 World Championship
series.description: 2026 F1 season — 22 rounds (Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancelled). Sprint weekends: China, Miami, Canada, Britain, Netherlands, Singapore. Saturday races: Baku, Las Vegas.

series.name: FIFA World Cup 2026
series.description: World Cup finale across USA, Canada & Mexico. Semi-finals: Spain 2–0 France, Argentina 2–1 England. Final: Spain vs Argentina.

series.name: Tennis Grand Slams 2026
series.description: US Open — the last slam of 2026. Main draw Aug 30 – Sep 13 at Flushing Meadows.

series.name: UFC
series.description: Announced UFC cards — numbered events and Fight Nights with prelim and main-card blocks in venue time.

series.name: WSL Championship Tour
series.description: World Surf League Championship Tour — remaining stops run as waiting periods; heats run when the swell is on, starting from first call each morning.

series.name: MotoGP World Championship
series.description: MotoGP 2026 — remaining rounds with sprint Saturdays and Sunday Grands Prix.

series.name: NFL 2026 — Marquee
series.description: NFL season landmarks — Kickoff Game and the Thanksgiving classics. Full weekly slates arrive via the live data feed.

series.name: Golf Majors 2026
series.description: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale — the final men's major of 2026.

series.name: Cycling Grand Tours 2026
series.description: Tour de France 2026 — Barcelona start July 4, Champs-Élysées finale July 26.

series.name: International Cricket
series.description: England vs India ODI series decider at Lord's. Further series land via the live data feed.

series.name: Rugby Nations Championship — Autumn
series.description: Autumn window of the first Nations Championship, Nov 1–29. Kickoff slots confirm nearer the window.

series.name: Marathon Majors 2026
series.description: The remaining World Marathon Majors of 2026 — Berlin, Chicago, New York.
